body:
Fixes #24

## Summary

macOS 15 Sequoia blocks ad-hoc-signed VK Bot Desktop builds on first
launch with **"VK Bot Desktop" Not Opened — Apple could not verify
"VK Bot Desktop" is free of malware...**. The project has no Apple
Developer ID, so artifacts are ad-hoc signed in CI and macOS attaches
`com.apple.quarantine` on download. macOS 15 removed the historical
Control-click → Open bypass, so users have no Finder-only way to allow
the app.

This PR is a **documentation + tests** change. The ad-hoc signing path
in `scripts/adhoc-sign-mac.cjs` and `.github/workflows/js.yml` already
works (CI smoke-tests `Signature=adhoc`), so the fix is to document the
user-side bypass everywhere users actually look on first install.

## Changes

- `README.md`: new **Open the app on macOS** section covering both the
  Terminal `xattr -dr com.apple.quarantine` one-liner and the macOS 15
  Sequoia System Settings → Privacy & Security → Open Anyway flow.
- `site/App.jsx` + `site/styles.css`: matching **Open the app on macOS**
  section on the GitHub Pages download page, bilingual (EN/RU), with
  two expandable `<details>` blocks (Terminal one-liner default-open,
  System Settings closed). Exports a `MACOS_INSTALL_COMMAND` constant
  so the command is rendered from a single source of truth.
- `docs/REQUIREMENTS.md`:
  - Requirement 17 clarified: ad-hoc signing is the allowed fallback
    when no Apple Developer ID is configured in CI secrets.
  - New requirement 25: the macOS Gatekeeper first-launch workflow
    must be documented in the README and the Pages site (EN+RU) with
    an SHA-256 verification reminder.
- `tests/pages-site.test.js`: new `it(...)` asserting the rendered page
  contains the install-macos copy keys, the literal `xattr -dr
  com.apple.quarantine` command, and both the English and Russian
  section headings.
- `docs/case-studies/issue-24/`: full case study with timeline, root
  cause, the rationale for **not** bumping Electron 33→42 or
  electron-builder 25→26 for this issue, Gatekeeper screenshot, and
  rendered EN/RU screenshots of the new section on the Pages site.
- `.changeset/macos-gatekeeper-install-docs.md`: patch-level changeset
  to drive the next release version bump.

## Screenshots

| English | Russian |
| --- | --- |
| https://github.com/konard/vk-bot-desktop/blob/issue-24-387107d2234b/docs/case-studies/issue-24/screenshots/pages-install-macos-en.png?raw=true | https://github.com/konard/vk-bot-desktop/blob/issue-24-387107d2234b/docs/case-studies/issue-24/screenshots/pages-install-macos-ru.png?raw=true |

## How to reproduce the underlying issue

1. Download `vk-bot-desktop-macos-arm64-0.9.12.dmg` (or x64) from the
   v0.9.12 release.
2. Drag `VK Bot Desktop.app` into `/Applications` and double-click it.
3. macOS 15 shows the Gatekeeper dialog captured in
   `docs/case-studies/issue-24/screenshots/macos-not-opened.png`.

## Test plan

- [x] `npm run lint` — passes (one pre-existing complexity warning
  unrelated to this PR).
- [x] `npm run format:check` — passes.
- [x] `npm run check:duplication` — passes.
- [x] `npm test` — 159/159 pass, including the new
  `documents the macOS Gatekeeper first-launch workflow for ad-hoc
  builds` assertion.
- [x] `npm run build:site` — clean build.
- [x] `bash scripts/check-mjs-syntax.sh` — clean.
- [x] `bash scripts/check-file-line-limits.sh` — clean.
- [x] Manual visual check on the built `site/dist/` in a real browser,
  English and Russian, both expanders open (screenshots committed).
- [ ] After merge: confirm the next release notes / download page render
  on a real macOS 15 machine using the documented Terminal flow.

## Why this is doc-only

The full code fix (Developer-ID signing + Apple notarization) requires
a paid Apple Developer ID this project does not have. The CI workflow
already auto-switches to the notarized path the moment `MAC_CSC_LINK`,
`MAC_CSC_KEY_PASSWORD`, `APPLE_API_KEY`, `APPLE_API_KEY_ID`, and
`APPLE_API_ISSUER` are provided as secrets (see `.github/workflows/js.yml`
around line 866). Until then, this PR gives every user a clear, copy-
pasteable first-launch workflow on macOS 15, in both English and
Russian.
title: docs: explain macOS Gatekeeper first-launch bypass for ad-hoc builds
